name: l2_powered_source_validation_error_budget
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceValidationErrorBudget aggregates hover and cruise validation run errors plus skipped-run blocker provenance by spin state.
note: Primary aggregate error-budget packet.

name: l2_powered_source_result_seed
